content.fact_text: The EventReplayEngine is a production-ready component that reconciles inventory by consuming Kafka events and applying them to the PostgreSQL database within ACID-compliant transactions, protected by distributed Redis locks and circuit breakers.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a robust Kafka consumer, uses Redis for SKU-level distributed locking, and performs ACID-compliant PostgreSQL updates to maintain inventory consistency. Implements circuit breaking for all I/O operations and provides comprehensive observability via Pino logging.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a fault-tolerant, scalable, and atomic event-based inventory reconciliation mechanism for the ecommerce backend.
